body.title: Guru Loop tests — service crash/recovery, circuit breaker
body.result: added concurrent-request test; all 4 completion criteria covered across test_ground_loop.py + test_ground_loop_recovery.py (18 pass, 1 CI-skip)
body.description:
Test suite for Guru Loop resilience and circuit breaker behavior.

**Affected files:** tests/test_guru_loop.py (new)
**Design rules:** test-coverage, resilience-testing
**Scope boundary:** Guru-specific tests only (service-internal tests stay with services)
**Completion criteria:**
  1. Test: crash service → next request triggers spawn → request succeeds
  2. Test: circuit breaker on → service crashes → not auto-spawned
  3. Test: multiple concurrent service requests → all handled
  4. Test: malformed service config → logged, Guru stays up
  5. All tests pass, coverage >80%
